overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai exploring a moonlit Japanese shrine. The character walks past a massive Buddha statue, through a courtyard with stone lanterns and red maple trees, wades through a lily pond near a waterfall, and enters a dark cave.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway beside massive Buddha statue

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps alongside a massive stone Buddha statue, moving toward the shrine courtyard

entered.detail: massive stone Buddha statue towering over the path, carved into the mountainside
weathered stone stairway ascending the hillside
large moss-covered boulders lining the right side of the path
traditional Japanese stone lanterns lining the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The samurai ascends a stone stairway flanked by a massive Buddha statue on the left and rocky outcrops on the right. The path is dimly lit by moonlight, with stone lanterns visible in the distance marking the entrance to the shrine courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shrine courtyard with stone lanterns and red maple trees

events.description: exits narrow stone stairway into open shrine courtyard with red maple trees
full moon becomes visible in the night sky, illuminating the waterfall ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the shrine courtyard passing rows of stone lanterns and vibrant red maple trees

entered.detail: vibrant crimson Japanese maple trees lining the courtyard
tall cascading waterfall flowing down the rocky cliff face
shallow pond with white lily pads covering the water surface
bright full moon rising above the shrine buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow stairway into an open courtyard, the scene reveals red maple trees and rows of stone lanterns leading toward a waterfall. The full moon becomes visible in the clear night sky, casting silver light across the lily pond ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lily pond with waterfalls under bright moonlight

events.description: steps into the shallow lily pond, water rippling around the character
turns slightly left to face the waterfall while continuing forward through the water

agents.ego_description: wading through the lily pond toward the waterfall, with water reaching the character's ankles

entered.detail: steep rock face with mist rising from the waterfall base

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow lily pond, passing white lotus flowers floating on the surface. The waterfall roars on the left, creating mist that catches the moonlight, while rocky cliffs rise on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cave entrance at the edge of the shrine

events.description: enters dark cave entrance, leaving the moonlit shrine and waterfall behind

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark cave entrance, transitioning from the open shrine to the enclosed rocky tunnel

entered.detail: dark opening in the rock wall leading into a narrow passage
rough stone walls of the cave entrance
rough stone walls of the cave entrance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the water and moonlight behind, the character enters a dark cave entrance. The rocky walls enclose the path as the shrine's ambient light fades, transitioning from the open courtyard into the shadowy tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, shadowed ascent into a wide, moonlit shrine courtyard. It begins with the samurai climbing a stone stairway, flanked by a massive Buddha statue and rugged rocky outcrops under dim moonlight. As the path ascends, the camera moves toward distant stone lanterns that signal the transition into a more open space. The scene then expands into a sprawling courtyard where the narrow walls give way to vibrant red maple trees and rows of lanterns leading toward a waterfall. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal a silver-lit lily pond beneath a clear night sky as the full moon emerges into view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a luminous, water-filled grotto into the oppressive darkness of a subterranean passage. It begins with the character wading through a shallow lily pond, passing white lotus flowers as a roaring waterfall on the left fills the air with moonlit mist. As the camera moves past the towering rocky cliffs on the right, the open brightness of the courtyard begins to recede. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the water and moonlight behind, stepping through a narrow cave entrance. Finally, the ambient light of the shrine fades completely, transitioning the view into a shadowy tunnel enclosed by heavy rocky walls.
